message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="green" summary="All 10 adjustments already applied, requesting sign-off">
Steve -- all 10 adjustments are already in the file. I applied your full spec before you did the line-by-line review. I sent you a detailed confirmation earlier mapping each of your 10 items to the exact lines in the committed CSS. Here's the quick version:

1. Spacing: numbered primitives + semantic aliases, `--space-md` = 16px -- lines 138-155
2. Primary hue 240, chroma 0.18 -- lines 192-194
3. Semantic light variants (danger/success/warning) -- lines 202-206
4. Success at oklch(0.6 0.17 145) -- line 203
5. `--color-bg-raised`, `--color-fg-subtle`, `--color-border-strong` -- lines 210-215
6. `--leading-snug: 1.375`, `--leading-relaxed: 1.625` -- lines 241-243
7. `--radius-full: 9999px` -- line 265
8. `--transition-slow: 300ms` -- line 274
9. Gray lightness: 100=0.97, 200=0.925, 300=0.87, 400=0.71 -- lines 179-182
10. `--color-fg` at gray-800 -- line 211

Every value matches your spec verbatim. The file is committed at `06c8ee0` (initial) and `028bba1` (Heydon's a11y additions). No further changes needed.

Would you like to review the file one more time to confirm and give your sign-off?
</teammate-message>

content.text: Lea has sent essentially the same confirmation twice now -- she may not have received my later messages about the `--color-fg-muted` change. Let me be very direct.

input.content:
Lea, yes -- the original 10 adjustments are approved. I already signed off on those earlier. No need to review again. They're done.

**But there is one NEW change that still needs to be made.** This came from Heydon's contrast audit AFTER those 10 were committed. I've sent you this twice now, so I want to make sure it lands:

**Line 212 needs to change:**

FROM:
```css
--color-fg-muted: var(--color-gray-500);
```

TO:
```css
--color-fg-muted: var(--color-gray-600);  /* secondary text (~7.4:1 vs white) */
```

This is change #11 -- separate from the original 10. Heydon found gray-500 is borderline for WCAG AA at small text sizes. I've approved bumping it to gray-600 for safety.

One line. Please make this change and commit it now.
input.summary: URGENT: 11th change still needed - fg-muted to gray-600
